issues.title: WatsonxAiApi: the IamAuthenticator inside of WatsonxAiApi only takes into account apikey but NOT baseUrl

comments.body:
Please hold - there is an other method called zenapikey.
I will further investigate.

There are two Auth methods: one for cloud (use the IamAuthenticator) and one for on-prem (using ZenApiKey).
Spring AI watsonx do NOT support on-prom (ZenApiKey).
